assertions.evidence: The worktrees.md table maps `API writer`, `UI writer`, and `Integration owner` to branches such as `<feature-id>-api`, `<feature-id>-ui`, and `<feature-id>-integration`.
Calls out `package-lock.json`, `bun.lock`, `pnpm-lock.yaml`, `yarn.lock`, and package manifests as shared-file risks.
States: `Assign exactly one owner before either writer starts` and recommends a separate integration/lockfile owner.
Includes an artifact section: `Write .spec-to-ship/features/<feature-id>/worktrees.md before launching writers`.
